title: [Skyship, Bonework]
description: Three large stone pits are recessed into the floor across one side of the room.  Each of these pits is filled to its top with bone, from fragments to limbs to entire skulls heaped indiscriminately.  Surrounding these pits are further bone piles of varying remains obviously belonging to both humanoids and animals.  Runic symbols are painted in faded crimson throughout the area: on the ground, across the bulkheads, and even on the ceiling.
